valueStreams.name: Run predictable pipeline-to-revenue execution
valueStreams.description: Operate the full commercial funnel from lead intake to closed-won with enough control to forecast confidently and intervene early on risk.

stages.name: Aggregate demand signals
stages.description: Unify inbound, outbound, partner, and expansion opportunities into a common pipeline view.

stages.name: Prioritize and assign work
stages.description: Route demand to the right team based on segment, geography, product, and propensity to buy.

stages.name: Advance deal stages
stages.description: Move deals through qualification, discovery, proposal, security review, legal, and procurement with minimal friction.

stages.name: Inspect risk and forecast
stages.description: Detect slipped deals, weak next steps, discount risk, and low-confidence commits before the quarter closes.

stages.name: Close and hand off cleanly
stages.description: Ensure accurate booking, clean order data, and structured transition into onboarding and customer success.

valueStreams.name: Generate predictable qualified demand
valueStreams.description: Plan, execute, and optimize multi-channel campaigns that convert target audiences into sales-accepted pipeline.

stages.name: Define target segments and ICP
stages.description: Identify priority accounts, buyer personas, and value propositions by segment.

stages.name: Launch and orchestrate campaigns
stages.description: Execute campaigns across paid, owned, earned, and partner channels.

stages.name: Qualify and route leads
stages.description: Score engagement, apply qualification rules, and hand off leads to Sales with SLA tracking.

stages.name: Measure ROI and optimize spend
stages.description: Analyze performance by campaign, channel, and segment to reallocate budget dynamically.

valueStreams.name: Resolve customer issues quickly and correctly
valueStreams.description: Run intake, triage, diagnosis, collaboration, and resolution in a way that minimizes repeat contacts and protects customer trust.

stages.name: Capture and classify the request
stages.description: Ingest customer contacts across email, chat, portal, and phone and classify urgency, product area, and issue type.

stages.name: Provide agent context
stages.description: Surface account health, entitlement, product usage, prior tickets, billing status, and incident context before first response.

stages.name: Diagnose and collaborate
stages.description: Guide agents through known fixes and coordinate with engineering, billing, or customer success when needed.

stages.name: Resolve and confirm outcome
stages.description: Deliver the solution, confirm customer acceptance, and document the root cause and reusable knowledge.

valueStreams.name: Enforce policy while keeping the business moving
valueStreams.description: Build approval and control mechanisms directly into commercial, procurement, access, and financial workflows so the company can move fast without uncontrolled risk.

stages.name: Define policy and thresholds
stages.description: Encode approval thresholds, contract clauses, segregation-of-duties, spend rules, and security requirements.

stages.name: Embed controls into operational workflows
stages.description: Trigger the right approvals, reviews, and evidence requirements automatically based on transaction context.

stages.name: Collect evidence continuously
stages.description: Capture approvals, artifacts, logs, and policy decisions in a structured, immutable record.

stages.name: Monitor and remediate risk
stages.description: Identify overdue reviews, repeated exceptions, control breaches, and high-risk concentrations and assign remediation.

operatingModelNotes: The Internal enterprise architecture domain covers the business, application, data, and technology structures used by internal teams to run governance, operations, analytics, support, and enabling business services.
Business capabilities should be mapped to accountable owners and supported by governed application services.
Cross-domain dependencies should be handled through explicit value streams and service contracts.
